'''Carosi VIII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carosus system]]. It was a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] planet deemed suitable for future [[Carosite]] colonization efforts. It had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
